Bot: Create shrine page for Oono Shrine
Copying from [[Category:Shikinaisha in Echigo Province]] to [[Category:qq]]{{wikidata link]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|Q1}}" to ""

Text replacement - "{{ill|Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|WD=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei}}" to "{{ill|Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)|WD=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized}}[[Category:Kokuhei-sha (Engishiki Jinmyocho)]]"
Text replacement - "is a shrine in the Engishiki Jinmyōchō." to "is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]."
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "| RONSHA ||" to "| {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|WD=Q135022904}}[[Category:RONSHA]] ||"
Text replacement - "Category:RONSHA" to "Category:Shikinai Ronsha"
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (upgraded script - full property sections, ILL links, P361 categorization)

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 大野神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Oono Shrine | native_name = 大野神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Oono Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|36.998809|137.872403}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Oono Shrine'''|大野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echigo Province]].
